question: What was the name of the president during World War II who left the position after April 12, 1945?

question: What governor of Arizona in 2009 ended his/her governmental position earliest?
sparql:
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {

FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.0vmt ns:government.governmental_jurisdiction.governing_officials ?y .

?y ns:government.government_position_held.basic_title ns:m.0fkvn .
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.from ?sk0} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.from ?sk1 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) <= "2009-12-31"^^xsd:dateTime) })
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk2} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk3 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk3) >= "2009-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime) })
?x ns:government.politician.government_positions_held ?c .

}
ORDER BY ?num LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.0chghy)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.0chghy ns:location.country.form_of_government ?x .
?x ns:government.form_of_government.countries ?c .
?c ns:type.object.name "Kingdom of Prussia"@en . 
}
logical_form: ( AND ( JOIN [ government , form of government , countries ] ( JOIN [ type , object , name ] "Kingdom of Prussia"@en ) ) ( JOIN ( R [ location , country , form of government ] ) [ Australia ] ) )

FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))

?x ns:common.topic.notable_types ns:m.01y2hnl .
?x ns:education.university.number_of_undergraduates ?c .

}
logical_form: ( AND ( JOIN [ education , university , number of undergraduates ] ( JOIN [ measurement unit , dated integer , number ] "40" ) ) ( AND ( JOIN [ common , topic , notable types ] [ College/University ] ) ( JOIN ( R [ location , location , contains ] ) [ Greeley ] ) ) )

question: Who was the Methodist governor of Ohio in 2011?

?y ns:government.government_position_held.basic_title ns:m.0fkvn .
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.from ?sk0} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.from ?sk1 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) <= "2011-12-31"^^xsd:dateTime) })
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk2} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk3 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk3) >= "2011-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime) })

}

question: Which country in the caribbean region has the largest army?

}

PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.04306rv)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.04306rv ns:language.human_language.countries_spoken_in ?x .
?x ns:location.country.official_language ns:m.04306rv .
?x ns:location.country.gdp_nominal ?c .
?c ns:measurement_unit.dated_money_value.amount "279500000000.0" . 
}
logical_form: ( AND ( JOIN [ location , country , gdp nominal ] ( JOIN [ measurement unit , dated money value , amount ] [ "279500000000 , 0" ] ) ) ( AND ( JOIN [ location , country , official language ] [ German Language ] ) ( JOIN ( R [ language , human language , countries spoken in ] ) [ German Language ] ) ) )
